cause_analysis.narrative: Sphynx Hair Lounge churned on 2026-02-11 after 394 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2026-01-09 (email) — first complaint keyword: "waiting for". Classification: competitive switch. The client mentioned an alternative provider before cancelling. Median Zoca response time was 14.0 days, above the 24-hour expectation.
recommendations: [Competitive] Client mentioned a competitor on 2026-01-14 — log this to Product + Sales for competitive positioning work.
